narrative:
Blooming Grove Twp township has 514 registered voters, with 56.0% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 35.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 8.2%, a pronounced Republican lean of 27.6 percentage points.
